item.name: Island Eggplant Knight
item.description: With just a single exposure to the sunlight outside of your bag, this island Eggplant Knight shall be primed to bear you forth like the purplest of steeds.

mount.name: Island Eggplant Knight
mount.action: Summon forth your island Eggplant Knight, an oversized vegetable embodiment of chivalry.
mount.description: Hailing from the selfsame land as the Tomato King, the Eggplant Knight shared a crate with the sovereign when they were shipped out. However, he fell overboard when the vessel encountered rough seas, and drifted for days before being deposited on a desert island. Among other feats, he prides himself on having played a key role in the founding of the West Mandra Empire.
mount.tooltip:
I thought ye were a feral turnip,
a murderous eggplant, or summat
like that!
- Tiny Trader
